/usr/bin/ar qc libtrajsim_lib.a CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/aerodynamics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/atmosphere.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/gravity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/liquid_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/guidance.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/dynamics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/models/integrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/trajsim_lib.dir/src/config/config_loader.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libtrajsim_lib.a
